title: Stage 4 close-date validation lifts forecast accuracy to 76%
anchor: Commit tier deals show the strongest improvement since the validation rule deployed April 17th.
connect: RevOps deal review attendance jumped from 4 of 14 calls last cycle to 14 of 14 this cycle.
body: Commit tier deals show the strongest improvement since the validation rule deployed April 17th. RevOps deal review attendance jumped from 4 of 14 calls last cycle to 14 of 14 this cycle.
trace: Close-date validation rule correlates with forecast accuracy jump from 58% to 76%, strongest on commit tier deals.

title: Wednesday forecast call runs at 28 minutes versus 90-minute baseline
